---
title: "Evaluation"
description: "Fitting and model evaluation"
---

This section covers how to evaluate models against data.

## Overview

Model evaluation in jaxcmr involves:

1. **Fitting** - Find parameters that best explain observed data
2. **Simulation** - Generate predictions from fitted parameters
3. **Comparison** - Compare model predictions to behavioral measures

The [Fitting](fitting.qmd) page covers the complete workflow, including generating simulations from fitted parameters and comparing model output to data.
